name: Welsh Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour with the bicarbonate of soda and cream of tartar.
2. Rub the butter into the flour and add the other dry ingredients: ground ginger, black treacle, milk, Demerara sugar, minced peel, and bicarbonate of soda.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Place the batter in a greased tin.
5. Bake in a slow oven (300°F or Mark 2) for 1 1/2 hours.
